events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God Turns 79
angles.copy: The man behind some of rock's most iconic riffs, Brian May, is 79 today. Still rocking, still a legend.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Ageless Icon Turns 83
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still commanding the stage! Happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: MTV launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcast video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV kicked off with a song that perfectly captured the moment. Did video really kill the radio star? We think not!

events.title: Oasis' Definitely Maybe released (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994, a landmark of Britpop.

angles.name: Britpop Classic Turns 32
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed British music forever. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary (1969)
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Festival of Peace & Music began on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music at 57
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. A moment in history that still resonates.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death (1977)
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years on, the King's legacy lives on. Remembering Elvis Presley, whose music continues to inspire generations.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death (1996)
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the tragic death of influential rapper Tupac Shakur in Las Vegas.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy at 30
angles.copy: Three decades since we lost a true music icon. Remembering Tupac Shakur and his unparalleled impact on hip-hop.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death (1970)
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix.

angles.name: Remembering a Guitar God
angles.copy: Fifty-six years since we lost the incomparable Jimi Hendrix. His influence on guitar music is still felt today.

events.title: The Beatles' Abbey Road released (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Turns 57
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since that legendary album cover and the timeless tracks within. A true masterpiece from The Beatles.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Rock Icon Turns 75
angles.copy: Happy 75th to the formidable Chrissie Hynde! Still delivering that distinctive voice and attitude.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad for It at 54
angles.copy: Our kid is 54 today! Wishing Liam Gallagher a proper rock 'n' roll birthday. As you were.

events.title: John Lennon's Imagine released (1971)
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic song 'Imagine' on this day in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine at 55
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon gave us 'Imagine,' a song that still speaks volumes about peace and hope.

events.title: First iPod launched (2001)
events.blurb: Apple released the first iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: The Gadget That Changed Music
angles.copy: Remember your first iPod? Twenty-five years ago, Apple launched the device that put a thousand songs in your pocket.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the release of the first Bond film, Dr. No, in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic themes to unforgettable gadgets, what's your favourite 007 moment?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire.
